title: MANGA Prototype eva story
wikitext:
[]: Prototype eva story             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jul 12, 2005 11:50 pm Its been mentioned that the Manga and the anime were both based on an original concept done before either Anno started on the anime or Sadamoto started on the Manga. Does any one know if any of this has made its way onto the net? All ive seen are a few character designs ona pics sight or three over the years.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Jul 16, 2005 4:07 am I never heard of this before..I guess Reichu will tell us for sure!

[]: Re: Prototype eva story             Quote Post by Soluzar » Sat Jul 16, 2005 2:52 pm DatDude wrote: Its been mentioned that the Manga and the anime were both based on an original concept done before either Anno started on the anime or Sadamoto started on the Manga. Does any one know if any of this has made its way onto the net? All ive seen are a few character designs ona pics sight or three over the years.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Jul 16, 2005 5:31 pm Ganix in general as in more then one person came up with the basic premiss before the manga started, and anno took over to do the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Jul 17, 2005 2:53 am Anno is ultimately the Father of Evangelion , but nothing in GAINAX is really the result of only a single creative entity, but a piloted force. It's not like he wrote every minute (and "purposefully" incomplete) detail into one complete Holy Anno draft and then said, "Okay, spread my genius!" (well, he might have...), only to have Sadamoto bastardize it to the chagrin of Anno's worshippers. Shit happens, and fortunately, it did. That's what makes Anno a good director; the ability to steer through occurences of shit. There was that thing about Shinji contacting an Angel, America going KABLOOEY, the Angels coming from the Moon, Rei getting all sickly, etc. Someone will post it. Just wait about two hours.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jul 17, 2005 3:02 am Hexon.Arq wrote: There was that thing about Shinji contacting an Angel, America going KABLOOEY, the Angels coming from the Moon, Rei getting all sickly, etc. Someone will post it. Just wait about two hours.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Jul 18, 2005 12:53 am Mr. Tines wrote: Ten minutes, more like.
